channel.title: Tutorial on Alberto Ruiz Biestro
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorial on Alberto Ruiz Biestro

item.title: Wannierizing with VASP
item.description:
Tutorial for Wannierizing Nb-Ti (mp-1216634). We will run VASP using atomate2, followed by a MLWF with Wannier90, but you could run VASP “by hand” if you’re not comfortable with atomate2.

Regardless, make sure the folder structure is the same as the one stated here.

You can find some slides in here that explain what Wannier functions are, why they matter, and some of this tutorial (if further explanation needed)
